2604.11548.title: SemaClaw: A Step Towards General-Purpose Personal AI Agents through Harness Engineering
2604.11548.paper_summary: The rise of OpenClaw in early 2026 marks the moment when millions of users began deploying personal AI agents into their daily lives, delegating tasks ranging from travel planning to multi-step research. This scale of adoption signals that two parallel arcs of development have reached an inflection point. First is a paradigm shift in AI engineering, evolving from prompt and context engineering to harness engineering-designing the complete infrastructure necessary to transform unconstrained agents into controllable, auditable, and production-reliable systems. As model capabilities converge, this harness layer is becoming the primary site of architectural differentiation. Second is the evolution of human-agent interaction from discrete tasks toward a persistent, contextually aware collaborative relationship, which demands open, trustworthy and extensible harness infrastructure. We present SemaClaw, an open-source multi-agent application framework that addresses these shifts by taking a step towards general-purpose personal AI agents through harness engineering. Our primary contributions include a DAG-based two-phase hybrid agent team orchestration method, a PermissionBridge behavioral safety system, a three-tier context management architecture, and an agentic wiki skill for automated personal knowledge base construction.
2604.11548.paper_summary_zh: OpenClaw在2026年初的崛起標誌著數百萬用戶開始將個人AI代理部署到日常生活中，委派從旅行規劃到多步驟研究等各種任務。這種規模的採用表明，兩條平行的發展弧線已達到轉折點。首先是AI工程的範式轉變，從提示和上下文工程演變為鞍具工程——設計出轉變不受限制的代理為可控、可審計和生產可靠系統所需的完整基礎設施。隨著模型能力的趨同，這一鞍具層正成為架構差異化的主要場所。其次是人類與代理之間的互動從離散任務演變為持續的、具上下文意識的協作關係，這要求開放、可信和可擴展的鞍具基礎設施。我們提出了SemaClaw，一個開源的多代理應用框架，通過鞍具工程朝著通用個人AI代理邁出了一步，以應對這些變化。我們的主要貢獻包括基於DAG的兩階段混合代理團隊協調方法、一個PermissionBridge行為安全系統、一個三層上下文管理架構，以及一個用於自動化個人知識庫構建的代理維基技能。
2604.11548.author: Ningyan Zhu et.al.
2604.11548.authors: Ningyan Zhu, Huacan Wang, Jie Zhou, Feiyu Chen, Shuo Zhang, Ge Chen, Chen Liu, Jiarou Wu, Wangyi Chen, Xiaofeng Mou, Yi Xu
